summary: After defeating a novice black magician, the protagonist navigates complex social dynamics with his allies and avoids revealing his 'Alley Boss' identity. He learns about the profitability of streaming his battles on the A-World platform before encountering his friend's siblings, Yuri and Youngjoon, at the Dark Cave. Despite his anxiety regarding Yuri's past confession, he agrees to join their party to hunt together.
key_moments: The protagonist defeats a novice black magician and receives a new quest regarding Briggs.
The protagonist discovers he has earned significant money through in-cube playbacks of his battle video.
The protagonist runs into his friend's siblings, Yuri and Youngjoon, and joins their party for a hunt.
